previous_campaign_summary: Command palette (Cmd+K), multi-select bulk actions, asset tagging, stats panel, keyboard shortcuts help, quick Markdown export, pinned conversations, preview rail gallery, drag-and-drop upload, video presets, settings modal, image variations, empty states, context menu. 18 phases completed, all CI passed.

objective_registry.core_objective: Powerful search with filters and saved queries

objective_registry.user_value: Chat prompt templates with seed library
Cmd+K with fuzzy search, navigation, actions
Tag picker, filter, chips on cards

phases.scope: 6 themes (light/dark/sepia/ocean/forest/night) with full CSS variables; useTheme hook; theme picker in settings and command palette
phases.user_visible_gain: Users can choose from 6 color themes to match their preference
phases.before_after: Only light and dark theme available
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Created useTheme hook with 6 themes. Theme picker UI in Settings with previews. Command palette actions for each theme. Bundle 611KB (+2KB).

phases.scope: useLanguage hook with zh/en translations; TopBar and SettingsModal use t()
phases.user_visible_gain: Users can switch between English and Chinese via settings
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Created useLanguage hook with translations for 30+ strings. Language selector in settings. TopBar and SettingsModal use t(). Bundle 615KB (+4KB). Top bar test updated to provide t.

phases.scope: Pure-JS PDF generator (no dependencies), PdfExportButton component, formatted chat content
phases.user_visible_gain: Download chat as real PDF file with title, date, role, and content
phases.before_after: PDF export used browser print only
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Created pure-JS PDF generator (no jsPDF dependency). PDF includes title, export date, role labels, timestamps, message content. Supports A4 page size with text wrapping. Bundle 618KB (+3KB).

phases.scope: useSharedConversations hook with localStorage, SharedConversationsModal for managing links, SharedRoute for public view via hash URL
phases.user_visible_gain: Users can share conversations via local-only shareable links and view in read-only mode
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Created useSharedConversations hook (localStorage with crypto tokens) and SharedConversationsModal with viewer, list, copy, delete. Hash-route SharedRoute handles direct access. Bundle 624KB (+6KB).

phases.objective: Code review and dead code cleanup
phases.user_visible_gain: Verified project is healthy: 49 tests, clean lint, no TODOs
phases.before_after: 3 campaigns of features, need quality gate
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, no unused, build succeeds
phases.notes: All checks pass. 49 tests, clean code, no TODOs, bundle 624KB.

phases.scope: BackupRestore component in Settings: export all localStorage to JSON, import JSON to restore
phases.user_visible_gain: Users can backup and restore all settings, templates, pinned, etc. via JSON file
phases.before_after: No way to backup user data
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Created BackupRestore component in Settings. Exports 13 localStorage keys to JSON. Imports with validation. Bundle 626KB (+2KB).

phases.objective: Workspace rename and custom tab labels
phases.scope: customTabLabels in user preferences; Settings inputs for each tab; TopBar uses custom labels with fallback
phases.user_visible_gain: Users can rename workspace tabs (chat/image/video/assets) to any custom text
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Added customTabLabels field to user preferences. Settings has 4 text inputs. TopBar uses custom labels with fallback to default translations. Bundle 628KB (+1KB).

phases.scope: useNotifications hook with permission request, settings toggle, video completion/failure notifications
phases.user_visible_gain: Users get notified when video tasks complete, even if they switch tabs
phases.before_after: No notifications, must stay on page
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Created useNotifications hook with permission management, persistence, and notification dispatch. Wired to video task completion. Added settings toggle. Bundle 629KB (+1KB).

phases.objective: Responsive sidebar and mobile navigation overhaul
phases.scope: MobileBottomNav component (sticky bottom tab bar); swipe gesture to open/close sidebar
phases.user_visible_gain: Smoother mobile experience with bottom tab bar and swipe gestures
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Created MobileBottomNav with backdrop blur. Added swipe gesture detection (right swipe opens, left swipe closes). Bundle 630KB (+1KB).

phases.scope: useVideoTaskHistory hook tracking last 30 completed/failed tasks; VideoTasksPanel shows history with status icons, links, and clear button
phases.user_visible_gain: Users can see history of all video generations, with status and quick access to completed videos
phases.before_after: Only current video task visible, no history of past tasks
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Created useVideoTaskHistory hook + VideoTasksPanel with status icons, timestamps, link to completed video, remove and clear actions. Added auto-tracking on task completion/failure. Bundle 633KB (+3KB).

phases.objective: Performance audit and bundle size optimization
phases.scope: Full health check after 10 phases of Campaign 004
phases.user_visible_gain: Verified project is healthy: 49 tests, clean lint, no TODOs
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, no unused, bundle 633KB
phases.notes: All checks pass. Bundle 633KB (+24KB for Campaign 004 features). No issues. Project is healthy.

phases.scope: PromptSuggestions component with 12 starter prompts and 8 contextual followups
phases.user_visible_gain: Users see quick-start prompts and follow-up examples to speed up chat
phases.before_after: Users type from scratch every time
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Created PromptSuggestions component with curated starter prompts (icon + text) and contextual followups. Shows on empty composer. Bundle 636KB (+2KB).

phases.scope: ImportConversationButton + parseImportedConversation supporting JSON and Markdown; creates new conversation with imported title
phases.user_visible_gain: Users can import chat history from JSON or Markdown files, creating a new conversation
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Created ImportConversationButton + parseImportedConversation. Supports JSON array/object, Markdown with 你/助手 markers. Bundle 638KB (+2KB).

phases.scope: ImageEditor component with rotate (90°), square crop, text annotation, save as new asset
phases.user_visible_gain: Users can edit images (rotate/crop/annotate) before using as reference or sharing
phases.before_after: Generated images are final, no editing
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Created ImageEditor with canvas-based rotate, crop (square), and text annotation. Wired to lightbox edit button. Saves as new asset via api.upload. Bundle 642KB (+4KB).

phases.objective: Onboarding tour enhancements with new features
phases.scope: Updated OnboardingTour from 5 to 7 steps covering command palette, themes, shortcuts, sharing, backup
phases.user_visible_gain: New users discover all Campaign 004 features via expanded tour
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Added 2 new onboarding steps (command palette, themes, shortcuts, sharing, backup) for total 7 steps. Bundle 643KB (+1KB).

phases.scope: ImageCompare modal for 2-4 image assets, side-by-side grid with metadata, hover highlight
phases.user_visible_gain: Users can compare 2-4 generated image variations side-by-side to pick the best
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Created ImageCompare modal. Shows 2-4 images with metadata (filename, dimensions, size, date). Hover highlights selected. Bundle 643KB (no change).
